calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2020 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ADVANCE PUBLIC AWARENESS'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT.

Appearances: Kimberly Gates of Gates Johnson Law (415.595.0375) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party; Pyng Soon of the Law Office of Pyng Soon (626.215.8215) appearing via Court Call for defendant USA Miniso Depot, Inc.

This matter is not argued. The Court reviews plaintiff's proposed consent judgment submitted at the hearing. The motion is granted. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, (E: maria.torreano@gmail.com)
(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Set For Trial On Mar-23-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
